新學python寫 tg bot
pass by reference 同 pass by value 又分得唔清楚
copy constructor 又冇
global variable, class variables 同 class functions又confusing 又麻煩
D high level datatype 既 compatibility 又要重新學過

有得揀都係不了

replies.msg:
Copy constructor
你obj.__dict__ = dict(another.__dict__)已經得
再唔係自己implement .__deepcopy__

pass by reference 同 pass by value 同大多數languages一樣 都係primitive passed by value, object passed by reference

global variable 點會同class variables confused到
global variables係read only直至你用global var_name去將global variable 拉入local scope
class variables全部要加self.

再唔係自己implement .__deepcopy__

global variable 點會同class variables confused到

replies.msg: you mean matplotlib?

樓主做邊行

import pandas as cv
